name: Lying Scissor Kick
shortDescription: A core and hip flexor exercise performed while lying flat, alternately raising and lowering legs in a scissor-like motion.
instructions: Lie on your back with arms at your sides, legs extended. Lift both legs slightly off the ground, then alternately move one leg up and the other down in a controlled, fluttering motion.
steps: Lie on your back with legs extended and arms at your sides.
Lift both legs a few inches off the ground, keeping them straight.
Alternate raising one leg while lowering the other in a scissor motion.
Continue to alternate legs in a controlled manner.
Keep your head and shoulders relaxed, core engaged.
breathing: Exhale as legs rise, inhale as legs lower.
